subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始め、糸が動かないように人差し指と小指で糸を挟んでおきます。両手の親指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Begin with the "Opening A". Hold the strings between the index fingers and little fingers to keep them from slipping. Release both thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 糸全体をぐるぐると4~5回転させて巻き付けます
subtitle.en: Twist the whole figure four or five times to wind the strings around.

subtitle.ja: 右手の小指の糸を左手の小指に移します。同じく右手の人差し指の糸を左手の人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Transfer the right little-finger string to the left little finger. Likewise, transfer the right index string to the left index finger.

subtitle.ja: 左手の小指のすべての糸を右手の親指に移します
subtitle.en: Transfer all the left little-finger strings to the right thumb.

subtitle.ja: 左手の人差し指のすべての糸を左手の親指に移します
subtitle.en: Transfer all the left index strings to the left thumb.

subtitle.ja: 両手のひもを握り、糸を左右に引きます
subtitle.en: Grasp the strings with both hands and pull them apart.

subtitle.ja: 糸の先端をつまみ、カタツムリの頭を出して完成です
subtitle.en: Pinch the ends of the strings to pull out the snail’s head, and this completes the figure.
